title: Eternal Sunshine Deluxe: Brighter Days Ahead
notes:
Issued in a gatefold jacket with 24-page booklet featuring lyrics and new photos.

All tracks are stylized in lowercase, except for track A4, "Saturn Returns Interlude", and track D22, "Hampstead".
All tracks are listed sequentially, regardless of side.

Not to be confused with the [url=https://www.discogs.com/release/33538773]EU release[/url].
